title: Delicious Kenyan Meat Dumplings
description: A traditional Kenyan dish featuring fatty and shaggy dumplings, this recipe is kid-friendly and diabetic-friendly, with a spicy kick from red chilli flakes.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground beef, flour, red chilli flakes, onion, salt, and black pepper.
Mix the ingredients together with your hands or a wooden spoon until just combined.
Add the beef broth and egg to the mixture and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5 minutes, until the dough comes together.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Place the dumplings onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each dumpling.
Bake the dumplings in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until cooked through.
